contract_claim: `path.resolve('examples/python/fibonacci.py')` resolves relative to process.cwd(), not the test file's directory. If tests are run from a different working directory, this path will be wrong.
observed_behavior: `path.resolve('examples/python/fibonacci.py')` resolves relative to process.cwd(), not the test file's directory. If tests are run from a different working directory, this path will be wrong.
